name: Nova Varnrable + African-American Sound Recordings + Rune Kielsgaard
description:
20_14 is a music platform from copenhagen curated by drummer and producer Rune Kielsgaard. Since 2021, the project aims to dissolve heirachi, frame contrasts, and create a space with room for new perspectives on sound and performance. 

Besides presenting events with favourites from around the world , three full lenght albums have been released already within the last year under the name 20_14 ASSEMBLY capturing experimentation and moments. 

This events will feature one long improv set w / 

Nova Varnrable 

African-American Sound Recordings 

Rune Kielsgaard  

This concert is supported by Liveurope, a pan-European initiative supporting concert venues in their efforts to promote European music diversity, and the Norwegian Arts Council.
